title: Hiyori and Yasuie Reveal Wano’s Pain
description: On pages 13–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #11, Momonosuke, Yasuie, Unknown person #12, Hiyori as Hiyori’s identity and Yasuie’s sacrifice pull the Wano rebellion into a deeper emotional crisis.
scene: Zoro protects Toko and meets Hiyori, while Yasuie prepares a sacrifice meant to rescue the rebellion’s plan.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're an outsider, aren't you? You act like the samural of this country, though.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But you seem to be a bad per-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Erm... DON'T seem to be a bad person.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ....!! I hope you can keep this a secret, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I... I'm searching for my older brother!! I haven't seen him for 20 years!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He might actually be here in Wano Right now....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One piece will be on break next week. It will resume in WSU issue $20.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Holding on to 20 years worth of feelings.....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: each and every one of them... wander- ing off on their own...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Perospero, daifuko, Galette, smoothie, flame, Mont d'or, Compote, and various other siblings

summary: This section advances the Wano - Hiyori and Yasuie storyline with 19 dialogue beats. Hiyori and Yasuie bring the rebellion’s emotional history into the foreground.
